AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: To Boldly Go
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Land a gravship 10 different times

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Crash Course
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Land a gravship with a landing incident 10 different times

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: World tour
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit 30 different regions in the world

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Parched and dry
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit a Desert and an Extreme desert

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Subzero
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit the Tundra, Icy Sea and Ice Sheet biomes

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Get Out of my Swamp!
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit a Tropical swamp, Temperate swamp and Cold bog

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Odysseus
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit the five new biomes introduced in Odyssey

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Scarred and deformed
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit a terraforming scar

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Tropical paradise
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit a coastal atoll

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Need more juice
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit an ancient chemfuel refinery

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Let it Flow
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit River, River delta, Headwarer, River confluence and River island

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Frozen Treasures
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit an Iceberg, Ice dunes and Frozen ruins

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Shore Vibes
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit a Lake, Dry lake, Toxic lake and Lava lake

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Pebble in the Sky
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit a basic asteroid

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Space Raiders
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Visit a Space settlement

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Ecological Disaster
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Abandon (and destroy) 20 regions of the world with your gravship

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Laying Down Foundations
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Get 200 Substructure in your gravship (checks daily)

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Frigate of the Skies
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Get 500 Substructure in your gravship (checks daily)

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Battlecruiser Operational
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Get 1500 Substructure in your gravship (checks daily)

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: The Enemy Within
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Launch your gravship with 5 hostile humans inside

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: So Long, Suckers!
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Launch your gravship with 50 hostile humans outside

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Left Behind
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Leave one of your colonists behind when launching the gravship

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Diverse Crew
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Launch a gravship with a crew of 10 people

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Kurzgesagt
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Launch a gravship with 10 chicken aboard

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Maximum Thrust
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Build 6 large thrusters on your gravship

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Hasta la Vista, Baby
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Destroy a mech hive

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Gravlite Hoarder
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Amass a total of 1000 gravlite panels

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Smartest Guy Around
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Use a sentience catalyst on an Alpha thrumbo

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Pruney Skin
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Have a colonist spend a whole year in total inside hot spring water.

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: The Final Frontier
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Have a colonist spend a whole year in space.

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Optimized Launches
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Launch a gravship with a Fuel optimizer, Pilot subpersona core and Gravship shield generator

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: Unconventional Warfare
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Get 10 unique weapons

AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.label: No One Can Hear You Scream
AchievementsExpanded.AchievementDef.description: Have a colonist die in space due to vacuum exposure
